cost_name: Grid Connection — HH1 200 MW New 380 kV Substation — Netherlands 2022

estimation.estimation_method: Derived from HH1 total CAPEX (~€1B all-in). TenneT Amaliahaven 380 kV substation dedicated to HH1. Includes 165t transformer transport (Mammoet), substation construction, and HV connection. FOAK cost — includes first-of-a-kind premium.

confidence.rationale: Total CAPEX is Level A (Shell/EU Innovation Fund). Grid connection portion is DERIVED from industry norms (~5% of total for dedicated substation). HH1 includes FOAK premium — not representative of nth-of-a-kind grid connection.

primary_drivers: New construction at Maasvlakte II port area
TenneT connection study and grid compliance

sources.title: Shell and TenneT Partner to Connect Holland Hydrogen 1 to High-Voltage Grid
sources.author: TenneT / Shell
